title: Sector engagement second taxonomy pass opened
body: Opened claim 3269f402-c5ff-4f36-9fb9-0afeed6599ca after owner clarified that knowledge-graph integration, Oak OpenAPI monorepo integration, and ontology repo re-examination all belong under sector engagement. Scope is planning taxonomy and live link updates only; Verdant Regrowing Pollen's TS6 migration claim remains disjoint.
